# PR checklist (keep it short)

- [ ] **Docs/comments**: exported symbols added/changed have JSDoc (`docs/CODE_QUALITY.md`)
- [ ] **Security**: auth/gating/permissions changes are explicitly documented in JSDoc/top-of-file comment
- [ ] **Duplication**: repeated UI/logic/data-access was extracted (or intentionally kept duplicated with a comment)
- [ ] **Repo maps**: updated `INDEX.md` for file/export/route changes
- [ ] **User-facing behavior**: updated `docs/FEATURES.md` if flows/routes/UX changed
